name: Tomatillo Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Pound tomatillos, husked, washed and cut into quarters
1 Large jalapeno chiles, stemmed, seeded and roughly chopped (1 to 2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tomatillos, jalapenos and water in a blender or food processor fitted with the metal blade.
2. Puree just until chunky.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and puree about 2 minutes more, or until no large chunks remain.
4. This salsa keeps in the refrigerator, in a covered container, about 3 days.
5. Yield: 1 1/2 cups
